Appearances:
Elana R. Jacobs, of Winer, McKenna & Burritt, LLP, Tel. 510.433.1000, for plaintiffs;
Roshni Chaudhari, of Ogletree, Deakins, Nash, Smoak & Stewart, P.C., Tel. 415.442.4810, for defendants.

Ruling: A R G U E D. DEFENDANT DARLING INGREDIENTS INC. Motion To Compel Plaintiffs Deposition is granted. Order signed. Judge Pro Tem: David McDonald; Clerk: Felicia Green; Not reported; Dept. 302.

Notice Of Motion To Quash Deposition Subpoenas And Request For Sanctions
Off Calendar Aug-21-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Sanctions denied because the Court finds partial merit in the positions of both parties and no discovery abuse on either side.
Appearances:
Attorney, Elana R. Jacobs of the law offices of Winer, McKenna & Burritt, LLP (510-433-100) appears as counsel for plaintiff/ moving party

Attorney, Jason P. Brown of the law offices of Ogletree Deakins Nash Smoak & Stewart, PC (415-442-4810) appears as counsel for defendant/ opposing party

The cause is argued and submitted by both sides as set forth in the court clerk's .doc (word) minutes.

The Court confirms the tentative ruling with modification.

PLAINTIFF ASHLEY ATWOOD'S Motion To Quash Deposition Subpoenas And Request For Sanctions is GRANTED in part and DENIED in part as reflected in the tentative ruling and the .doc (word) minutes of the court clerk. The Court will review and sign the [proposed] order or will issue its own written order.

Judge Pro Tem: James Fleming; Clerk: J. Rios Merida; Not Reported. (D302)
